In 1993 Eurolink Systems was founded for distributing, integrating and designing HW and SW Commercial Off The Shelf (COTS) solutions to elaborate signals in mission critical operations for Defense, Aerospace, Industry and Finance sectors.
From 1996, Eurolink Systems takes care of the life cycle management of different embedded COTS solutions for the Italian Defense company "Leonardo".
In 2009, Eurolink Systems is a pioneer in the robotics sector with electric propelled mini unmanned vehicles (UxV) designed to meet italian and international armies requirements.
In 2016, Eurolink Systems wins an international tender to supply mini unmanned aerial systems to the United Nations for peacekeeping operations.

Company Short Description:
Aero Sekur has its roots in the history of Irvin Manifatture Industriali, an Italian Company born in the 1960's and specialized in the manufacturing of textile equipment (mainly parachutes and aero-braking systems) for military applications.

In the 1980s, Irvin acquired Sekur, a branch of Pirelli, the renowned brand in the field of rubber technology.  Through this acquisition, new business lines and capabilities entered in the Company portfolio, including equipment for personal protection, flexible fuel tanks and a range of equipment based on the use of technological fabrics and their application in all environments.

From this achievement, the Aero Sekur was born, merging the background and the technological skills of the two Companies into a highly specialized, strategic and competitive player in both military and civil markets.

It was in 1990 that the Company established its premises in Aprilia, strategically positioned a few kilometers away from Rome and its airports.

In 2017 the former Aero Sekur S.p.A. was split into two separate entities, reflecting the former organization of the Company in two main business lines (Airborne and Defence). 

As the range of products and applications is various and the number of Customers is keeping growing across the years, the Company is committed to innovation and to create new applications for its core technologies, which are continuously improved and implemented.

Today Aero Sekur is a Tier One leading provider of advanced survival equipment and systems for mission-critical air and ground vehicles. 

The Company designs, manufactures and maintains a suite of key safety and survival systems and services for the Aerospace & Defence industry, including:
 
Helicopter Emergency Flotation Systems, 
External Liferaft Systems,
Crashworthy Fuel Systems.

Company SEO Description: Bright ideas for light satellites.
Company Short Description:
Stellar Project is a space technology company created in 2016 as a spin-off of the University of Padova, Italy, offering game-changing solutions for light satellites with a high degree of care towards space environmental sustainability. 

Stellar Project aims to fill the gap in performances and capabilities between small satellites and large spacecraft, providing original and proprietary technology.

The company vision embraces global space democratization, bringing together the best talent and creativity to develop bright ideas to fit into smart satellites products and services.

In 2021, Stellar Project launched LaserCube, a proprietary and patented revolutionary technology.

LaserCube is a patented miniature low-power, high-performance laser communication terminal specifically designed for CubeSats and smallsats.
With its independent and accurate pointing capability, LaserCube allows throughput performance more than ten times higher than state-of-the-art radiofrequency solutions for small satellites enabling several innovative business applications. 
LaserCube, as the optical telecommunication highway for small satellites, will deliver an unprecedented increase in data volume, communication security, and speed: another step towards accessible and affordable space technology for all.

Stellar Project is also working in consortiums within the H2020 program on Quantum Communication and started to expand its activities on data analytics both for terrestrial applications and the space environment providing tools for Space Debris Analysis and monitoring.

Stellar Project is a member of AIPAS – Italian Space Industry Association and Access Space Alliance.

Collaborazione: Lavoriamo insieme ai clienti e crediamo che ognuno ha il proprio ruolo nel fornire la migliore soluzione.
Concorrenza: Stiamo competendo per vincere. Sappiamo che la concorrenza rende tutti più forti.
Creatività: Siamo innovativi, siamo ingegneri, e ci adoperiamo per applicare sempre la giusta tecnologia e la migliore soluzione.
Affidabilità: Consegniamo ciò che promettiamo. Crediamo che la qualità del nostro servizio definisca chi siamo.
Rispetto: Siamo onesti con noi stessi e con gli altri. Valorizziamo le nostre competenze e siamo impegnati a far crescere il talento dei nostri collaboratori.

Company Short Description:
BEAMIT Group is one of the most integrated and advanced additive manufacturing service providers in the world to serve the most demanding industries. Based in Fornovo di Taro (Parma, Italy), BEAMIT has been operating in the field of additive manufacturing (AM) with metal powders for nearly 25 years. With almost 60 dedicated additive manufacturing systems distributed in over 6 facilities between Italy and UK today the Group counts over 120 employees.
In 2019, Sandvik Group, global leader in hi-tech engineering and metal powder with the widest range of alloys for Additive Manufacturing as well as remarkable expertise in AM printing technologies for advanced metal components, acquired a significant stake in BEAMIT.
In 2020, BEAMIT acquired a significant stake in PRES-X, an innovative start-up in the field of special post-production processes for 3D printing. In the same year BEAMIT acquired AM service bureau ZARE and in 2021 acquired 3T Additive Manufacturing (Newbury, UK) from AM GLOBAL Holding GmbH becoming the most integrated and advanced AM service provider in the world.
With over 30 alloys BEAMIT has the highest number of materials qualified as AM player in EU and can claim an extraordinary R&D department with a considerable amount of patented new materials. 
BEAMIT Group also holds several relevant quality certifications including AS/EN9100 and IATF Automotive, and NADCAP accreditation.
The company specializes in advanced metal AM components for:
-	Aerospace
-	Automotive
-	Energy
-	Racing 
-	Industrial
-	Motorsport

Company Short Description:
AeroDron è un'azienda italiana esclusivamente dedicata alla ricerca e sviluppo di applicazioni che utilizzano Sistemi Aeromobili a Pilotaggio Remoto (SAPR).
Dal 2013, anno della fondazione, AeroDron sperimenta e realizza soluzioni applicative in molteplici settori industriali e nella Pubblica Amministrazione, facendo leva sull'immenso valore delle informazioni che possono essere tratte da rilievi aerei a bassa quota, utilizzando lo stato dell'arte delle tecnologie di volo, rilevamento, visione e post-elaborazione.
A sottolineare il nostro impegno all'innovazione nello sviluppo di applicazioni che utilizzino SAPR, AeroDron è stata selezionata come una delle più interessanti start-up dai principali interlocutori economici italiani e ha vinto il premio Lamarck a SMAU Bologna nel 2015.
Nello 2013 siamo stati selezionati da b-ventures, un incubatore di Buongiorno e NTT DOCOMO, tra le start-up da sostenere attraverso un programma di accelerazione costruito specificatamente per le iniziative nei settori ad alta tecnologia. Grazie a b-ventrues, AeroDron ha potuto attrarre nella propria compagine societaria una selezione di investitori e partner di primaria importanza, che hanno garantito al nostro progetto le risorse e il mentoring indispensabili per supportare la visione e il nostro progetto strategico.
La nostra missione è acquisire la leadership nella realizzazione di soluzioni applicative e nella fornitura di servizi di qualità basati sull'utilizzo dei SAPR.
Specializzati in geomatica, interpretazione delle immagini, modellazione 3D e remote sensing, mettiamo a disposizione le nostre competenze per il monitoraggio ambientale, la gestione del rischio idrogeologico, l'agricoltura di precisione, la progettazione, le ispezioni infrastrutturali, la topografia e in tutte quelle occasioni in cui l'utilizzo di SAPR può creare valore, migliorare l'efficacia e mitigare i rischi dei nostri Clienti e della Comunità.

We are up in the sky since 1970. 
LMA in short: high precision mechanical processes for aeronautics and aerospace.

Straight up to the sky and ever higher, up into space.
"We work constantly to keep one step ahead."​ 
This is LMA's philosophy in the field of technological innovation.

CGR spa (Compagnia Generale Ripreseaeree) is leader in Italy and Europe in the field of photogrammetry and remote sensing. CGR business ranges from participation in programmes covering wide extents of territory, for which all types of information are captured, to the creation and development of specific solutions based on the cloud platform called URBEX™.

Company Short Description:
AeroDron è un'azienda italiana esclusivamente dedicata alla ricerca e sviluppo di applicazioni che utilizzano Sistemi Aeromobili a Pilotaggio Remoto (SAPR).
Dal 2013, anno della fondazione, AeroDron sperimenta e realizza soluzioni applicative in molteplici settori industriali e nella Pubblica Amministrazione, facendo leva sull'immenso valore delle informazioni che possono essere tratte da rilievi aerei a bassa quota, utilizzando lo stato dell'arte delle tecnologie di volo, rilevamento, visione e post-elaborazione.
A sottolineare il nostro impegno all'innovazione nello sviluppo di applicazioni che utilizzino SAPR, AeroDron è stata selezionata come una delle più interessanti start-up dai principali interlocutori economici italiani e ha vinto il premio Lamarck a SMAU Bologna nel 2015.
Nello 2013 siamo stati selezionati da b-ventures, un incubatore di Buongiorno e NTT DOCOMO, tra le start-up da sostenere attraverso un programma di accelerazione costruito specificatamente per le iniziative nei settori ad alta tecnologia. Grazie a b-ventrues, AeroDron ha potuto attrarre nella propria compagine societaria una selezione di investitori e partner di primaria importanza, che hanno garantito al nostro progetto le risorse e il mentoring indispensabili per supportare la visione e il nostro progetto strategico.
La nostra missione è acquisire la leadership nella realizzazione di soluzioni applicative e nella fornitura di servizi di qualità basati sull'utilizzo dei SAPR.
Specializzati in geomatica, interpretazione delle immagini, modellazione 3D e remote sensing, mettiamo a disposizione le nostre competenze per il monitoraggio ambientale, la gestione del rischio idrogeologico, l'agricoltura di precisione, la progettazione, le ispezioni infrastrutturali, la topografia e in tutte quelle occasioni in cui l'utilizzo di SAPR può creare valore, migliorare l'efficacia e mitigare i rischi dei nostri Clienti e della Comunità.

Dal 1969, anno della sua fondazione, l'evoluzione di MEPIT è stata continua e costante e ha consentito all'azienda di trasformare l'artigianato industriale degli albori in eccellenza hi-tech, acquisendo importanti e prestigiose commesse in vari settori della componentistica meccanica ad alto contenuto tecnologico. La versatilità operativa, la capacità di "plasmare"​ i materiali – anche i più ostici – gli investimenti sulla formazione delle risorse e sugli aggiornamenti dei macchinari denotano un percorso di crescita che ha condotto MEPIT a consolidare la propria posizione di partner d'eccellenza nei settori che maggiormente richiedono soluzioni innovative ed avanzate.

In MEPIT si lavora qualsiasi tipo di materiale: dal plexiglas all'alluminio, dal nylon all'acciaio super-rapido temperato (64-66 HRC), dal titanio al nickel e a tutte le leghe di acciaio speciale tipo Inconel-750, Inconel-718, Hastelloy-X, 17-4PH. Inoltre, per offrire un servizio completo "chiavi in mano"​ MEPIT è in grado - attraverso la collaborazione con fornitori qualificati - di offrire al cliente un prodotto finito gestendo anche processi speciali quali: saldatura, trattamento termino, trattamento superficiale, controlli non distruttivi, verniciatura, etc. La qualità ed il rigore di questa versatilità sono garantiti dal sistema qualità MEPIT certificato conforme alla norma UNI EN ISO 9001 ed anche alla più rigorosa norma UNI EN 9100 (Aerospace Series).

Benvenuto/a! 

Air Dolomiti is the Italian airline of the Lufthansa Group. Our story began in 1991 when we launched our operations with our first Trieste-Genoa route. 
Since then, we have continuously expanded our network and currently operate a modern fleet of Embraer 195 and Embraer 190 aircraft. Via our hubs in Munich and Frankfurt, we offer multiple daily connections to numerous Italian and European destinations. To accommodate the needs of both business and leisure travellers, our fare plan is arranged into six different fare levels: Economy Light, Economy Classic, Economy Green, Economy Flex, Business Saver, Business Flex. 

Ever since our inception, we have prided ourselves on being an efficient and reliable airline that puts the customer first. Our service is built around our passengers' needs, and this is one of the reasons we offer several flights a day and are so passionate about running a regular service.
Our attention to quality has been recognised with renowned international certifications (UNI EN ISO 9001:2008 for "global quality" and IOSA, International Operations Standard Audit). Drawing on the Lufthansa Group's commitment to the environment, we also obtained EMAS (Eco-Management and Audit Scheme) registration in 2021.

As a Miles & More partner, our guests can earn miles on all Air Dolomiti flights while savouring the Italian way of life – la dolce vita – right from the get-go. 

🌐 For additional information or customer service requests, please visit airdolomiti.eu or follow us on Facebook, X, and Instagram. 

✈️ We look forward to welcoming you on board!

Company Short Description:
ParaLoon develops inflatable / unfoldable "parabolic balloon" concentrator photovoltaic (CPV) structures to collect both photonic and thermal solar energy for applications in space and on earth. 

Applications in space would include satellites, space stations, habitats or mission vehicles. On earth, these structures could be used for remote areas, recreational / defense / refugee or other campsites, emergency situations or mobile applications.

The ParaLoon system combines lightweight, inflatable / unfoldable, parabolic structures and thermo-photo-voltaic (TPV) technologies for the efficient conversion of both light and heat to electric energy. 

If wireless power beaming becomes a reality, the electric energy could also be transferred to users in space, on Earth or even on the Moon or Mars by satellites or a satellite network in the future.

Company SEO Description: Bright ideas for light satellites.
Company Short Description:
Stellar Project is a space technology company created in 2016 as a spin-off of the University of Padova, Italy, offering game-changing solutions for light satellites with a high degree of care towards space environmental sustainability. 

Stellar Project aims to fill the gap in performances and capabilities between small satellites and large spacecraft, providing original and proprietary technology.

The company vision embraces global space democratization, bringing together the best talent and creativity to develop bright ideas to fit into smart satellites products and services.

In 2021, Stellar Project launched LaserCube, a proprietary and patented revolutionary technology.

LaserCube is a patented miniature low-power, high-performance laser communication terminal specifically designed for CubeSats and smallsats.
With its independent and accurate pointing capability, LaserCube allows throughput performance more than ten times higher than state-of-the-art radiofrequency solutions for small satellites enabling several innovative business applications. 
LaserCube, as the optical telecommunication highway for small satellites, will deliver an unprecedented increase in data volume, communication security, and speed: another step towards accessible and affordable space technology for all.

Stellar Project is also working in consortiums within the H2020 program on Quantum Communication and started to expand its activities on data analytics both for terrestrial applications and the space environment providing tools for Space Debris Analysis and monitoring.

Stellar Project is a member of AIPAS – Italian Space Industry Association and Access Space Alliance.

Company Short Description:
BEAMIT Group is one of the most integrated and advanced additive manufacturing service providers in the world to serve the most demanding industries. Based in Fornovo di Taro (Parma, Italy), BEAMIT has been operating in the field of additive manufacturing (AM) with metal powders for nearly 25 years. With almost 60 dedicated additive manufacturing systems distributed in over 6 facilities between Italy and UK today the Group counts over 120 employees.
In 2019, Sandvik Group, global leader in hi-tech engineering and metal powder with the widest range of alloys for Additive Manufacturing as well as remarkable expertise in AM printing technologies for advanced metal components, acquired a significant stake in BEAMIT.
In 2020, BEAMIT acquired a significant stake in PRES-X, an innovative start-up in the field of special post-production processes for 3D printing. In the same year BEAMIT acquired AM service bureau ZARE and in 2021 acquired 3T Additive Manufacturing (Newbury, UK) from AM GLOBAL Holding GmbH becoming the most integrated and advanced AM service provider in the world.
With over 30 alloys BEAMIT has the highest number of materials qualified as AM player in EU and can claim an extraordinary R&D department with a considerable amount of patented new materials. 
BEAMIT Group also holds several relevant quality certifications including AS/EN9100 and IATF Automotive, and NADCAP accreditation.
The company specializes in advanced metal AM components for:
-	Aerospace
-	Automotive
-	Energy
-	Racing 
-	Industrial
-	Motorsport

Company Short Description:
e-GEOS, a Telespazio (80%) / ASI (20%) company, is a leading international player in the geo-spatial business. e-GEOS offers a complete range of products and services in the Earth Observation and in the geo-spatial application domains, based on both optical and radar satellites as well as on aerial surveys. The Rome-based company employs more than 300 people and operates through the Earth Observation centers in Matera (Italy) and Neustrelitz (Germany). As the European hub for VHR (Very High Resolution) data, e-GEOS grants unique access to the COSMO-SkyMed data, and to the major optical missions.

In particular, COSMO-SkyMed represents a tremendous competitive advantage as it opens up a new era of operational applications. The COSMO-SkyMed earth observation programme of the Italian Space Agency and the Italian Ministry of Defence, based on a constellation of four VHR SAR satellites, provides all-weather, day and night, world-wide radar data acquisitions. e-GEOS exploits COSMO-SkyMed data to offer near-real-time monitoring services and large-area mapping capabilities for customers such as NGA (National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency of the US Government), in combination with its existing product and services portfolio, which comprises solutions for key vertical markets including emergency management, maritime surveillance, agriculture & forestry, cadastre, environmental protection, oil & gas, utilities and industries.

Company Short Description:
Aero Sekur has its roots in the history of Irvin Manifatture Industriali, an Italian Company born in the 1960's and specialized in the manufacturing of textile equipment (mainly parachutes and aero-braking systems) for military applications.

In the 1980s, Irvin acquired Sekur, a branch of Pirelli, the renowned brand in the field of rubber technology.  Through this acquisition, new business lines and capabilities entered in the Company portfolio, including equipment for personal protection, flexible fuel tanks and a range of equipment based on the use of technological fabrics and their application in all environments.

From this achievement, the Aero Sekur was born, merging the background and the technological skills of the two Companies into a highly specialized, strategic and competitive player in both military and civil markets.

It was in 1990 that the Company established its premises in Aprilia, strategically positioned a few kilometers away from Rome and its airports.

In 2017 the former Aero Sekur S.p.A. was split into two separate entities, reflecting the former organization of the Company in two main business lines (Airborne and Defence). 

As the range of products and applications is various and the number of Customers is keeping growing across the years, the Company is committed to innovation and to create new applications for its core technologies, which are continuously improved and implemented.

Today Aero Sekur is a Tier One leading provider of advanced survival equipment and systems for mission-critical air and ground vehicles. 

The Company designs, manufactures and maintains a suite of key safety and survival systems and services for the Aerospace & Defence industry, including:
 
Helicopter Emergency Flotation Systems, 
External Liferaft Systems,
Crashworthy Fuel Systems.

Company Short Description:
NOVOTECH is a key partner for many industries working in the aerospace field and other advanced technology sectors. The Company pillars that add value in the aerospace industry are as follows: design/certification and production of small aircrafts and components, automated composite manufacturing processes, advanced FEA, static/dynamic experimental tests.
NOVOTECH has proven capability in design and manufacturing of composite structures, based on low cost and out-of-autoclave automated production processes (such as AFP, PCM, RTM, CF and LRI). The Company can count on researchers and qualified engineers for the development and manufacturing of composite prototypes with complex shapes and variable thickness, based on advanced design methodologies for draping, formability and composite warpage prediction. The Company has designed and implemented pilot moulds for manufacturing of double curved large panels through Automated Fiber Placement (AFP) process.
NOVOTECH offers solutions addressed to all companies interested to increase their competitiveness in the field of composite materials, through the development of advanced manufacturing processes.
Recently, NOVOTECH has developed and patented a new hybrid composite material, formed by a sequence of layers consisting of reinforcing unidirectional of fabrics in polymeric matrices, metal alloy sheets and elastomeric films.
Recently, NOVOTECH is involved in the design and manufacturing of the SEAGULL, a high performing ultralight amphibian aircraft with hybrid-electric motorization, easy and economical, operating in autonomy from any infrastructure. A retractile wing makes possible to pass from an aircraft to a hull configuration automatically. The integration of methods and technologies from aerospace and naval sectors have been merged to create a unique product relying on a wide use of high performing composite materials and eco-friendly production processes.

Company Short Description:
The Council of European Aerospace Societies (CEAS) is an International Non-Profit Association, with the aim to develop a framework within which the major Aerospace Societies in Europe can work together.

It presently comprises eleven Trustee Member Societies with a combined roughly 35.000 individual members: 

3AF (Association Aéronautique et Astronautique de France, France)
AAAR ( Asociatia Aeronauticâ si Astronauticâ a României, Romania)
AIAE (Asociación de Ingenieros Aeronáuticos de España, Spain)
AIDAA (Associazione Italiana Di Aeronautica e Astronautica, Italy)
CzAeS (Czech Aerospace Society, Czech Republic)
DGLR (Deutsche Gesellschaft für Luft- und Raumfahrt, Germany)
FTF (FlygTekniska Föreningen, Sweden)
NVvL (Nederlandse Vereniging voor Luchtvaarttechniek, Netherlands)
PSAA (Polish Society of Aeronautics and Astronautics, Poland)
RAeS (Royal Aeronautical Society, United Kingdom)
SVFW (Schweizerische Vereinigung für Flugwissenschaften, Switzerland)

CEAS also comprises four Corporate Members:

EASA (European Union Aviation Safety Agency)
ESA (European Space Agency)
EUROAVIA (The European Association of Aerospace Students)
EUROCONTROL (European Organisation for the Safety of Air Navigation)

Following its establishment as a legal entity conferred under Belgium Law, this association began its operations on January 1st, 2007. Its basic mission is to add value at a European level to the wide range of services provided by the constituent Member Societies, allowing for greater dialogue between the latter and the European institutions, governments, aerospace and defence industries and academia. 

The CEAS is governed by a Board of Trustees, with representatives of each of the Member Societies.

Techno System Developments (TSD) is an Italian private company founded in 1977. TSD is specialized into design, development and manufacturing of on-board and ground electronic equipment for aero-space applications with an experience of more than 300.000 hours of operations in flight and a total of five systems, operating in space at this time.  Our equipment is aboard satellites orbiting the Earth, spacecraft and orbiters for deep space missions and aboard the International Space Station.

- Requirement Assessment
- Architectural Design
- HW Design, Development & Testing
- SW Design, Development & Testing - Breadbording & Simulation
- Electronic Manufacturing, Assembling, Integration & Testing
- System Testing and Space Qualification.

The very high integration levels are achieved thanks to very peculiar circuits design solutions and to a complex design of the PCB, adopting for it, state of art technologies.

Company Short Description:
Aero Sekur has its roots in the history of Irvin Manifatture Industriali, an Italian Company born in the 1960's and specialized in the manufacturing of textile equipment (mainly parachutes and aero-braking systems) for military applications.

In the 1980s, Irvin acquired Sekur, a branch of Pirelli, the renowned brand in the field of rubber technology.  Through this acquisition, new business lines and capabilities entered in the Company portfolio, including equipment for personal protection, flexible fuel tanks and a range of equipment based on the use of technological fabrics and their application in all environments.

From this achievement, the Aero Sekur was born, merging the background and the technological skills of the two Companies into a highly specialized, strategic and competitive player in both military and civil markets.

It was in 1990 that the Company established its premises in Aprilia, strategically positioned a few kilometers away from Rome and its airports.

In 2017 the former Aero Sekur S.p.A. was split into two separate entities, reflecting the former organization of the Company in two main business lines (Airborne and Defence). 

As the range of products and applications is various and the number of Customers is keeping growing across the years, the Company is committed to innovation and to create new applications for its core technologies, which are continuously improved and implemented.

Today Aero Sekur is a Tier One leading provider of advanced survival equipment and systems for mission-critical air and ground vehicles. 

The Company designs, manufactures and maintains a suite of key safety and survival systems and services for the Aerospace & Defence industry, including:
 
Helicopter Emergency Flotation Systems, 
External Liferaft Systems,
Crashworthy Fuel Systems.

Company Short Description:
BEAMIT Group is one of the most integrated and advanced additive manufacturing service providers in the world to serve the most demanding industries. Based in Fornovo di Taro (Parma, Italy), BEAMIT has been operating in the field of additive manufacturing (AM) with metal powders for nearly 25 years. With almost 60 dedicated additive manufacturing systems distributed in over 6 facilities between Italy and UK today the Group counts over 120 employees.
In 2019, Sandvik Group, global leader in hi-tech engineering and metal powder with the widest range of alloys for Additive Manufacturing as well as remarkable expertise in AM printing technologies for advanced metal components, acquired a significant stake in BEAMIT.
In 2020, BEAMIT acquired a significant stake in PRES-X, an innovative start-up in the field of special post-production processes for 3D printing. In the same year BEAMIT acquired AM service bureau ZARE and in 2021 acquired 3T Additive Manufacturing (Newbury, UK) from AM GLOBAL Holding GmbH becoming the most integrated and advanced AM service provider in the world.
With over 30 alloys BEAMIT has the highest number of materials qualified as AM player in EU and can claim an extraordinary R&D department with a considerable amount of patented new materials. 
BEAMIT Group also holds several relevant quality certifications including AS/EN9100 and IATF Automotive, and NADCAP accreditation.
The company specializes in advanced metal AM components for:
-	Aerospace
-	Automotive
-	Energy
-	Racing 
-	Industrial
-	Motorsport

Benvenuto/a! 

Air Dolomiti is the Italian airline of the Lufthansa Group. Our story began in 1991 when we launched our operations with our first Trieste-Genoa route. 
Since then, we have continuously expanded our network and currently operate a modern fleet of Embraer 195 and Embraer 190 aircraft. Via our hubs in Munich and Frankfurt, we offer multiple daily connections to numerous Italian and European destinations. To accommodate the needs of both business and leisure travellers, our fare plan is arranged into six different fare levels: Economy Light, Economy Classic, Economy Green, Economy Flex, Business Saver, Business Flex. 

Ever since our inception, we have prided ourselves on being an efficient and reliable airline that puts the customer first. Our service is built around our passengers' needs, and this is one of the reasons we offer several flights a day and are so passionate about running a regular service.
Our attention to quality has been recognised with renowned international certifications (UNI EN ISO 9001:2008 for "global quality" and IOSA, International Operations Standard Audit). Drawing on the Lufthansa Group's commitment to the environment, we also obtained EMAS (Eco-Management and Audit Scheme) registration in 2021.

As a Miles & More partner, our guests can earn miles on all Air Dolomiti flights while savouring the Italian way of life – la dolce vita – right from the get-go. 

🌐 For additional information or customer service requests, please visit airdolomiti.eu or follow us on Facebook, X, and Instagram. 

✈️ We look forward to welcoming you on board!

ABOUT US
We are up in the sky since 1970. 
LMA in short: high precision mechanical processes for aeronautics and aerospace.
Since its born, LMA has been operating in the field of precision mechanics for the civil and military aeronautical and helicopter sectors, gradually expanding its market to include mechanical production for the aerospace market.
Thanks to the management of the Boscolo family, which founded the company in 1970 and is now in its second generation, LMA boasts consolidated corporate stability, an important guarantee for all customers who rely on its services.
In particular, LMA is considered an innovative Company of great importance thanks to the adoption of the most complete form of development: verticalization.
This process enables to offer products that integrate: development and research, production engineering, machining of metals, procurement of materials and stock management, heat treatments and assemblies.
A universe of specific and professional skills but, above all, a set of key values that represent our daily actions. 
Honesty.  Integrity.  Respect.  Transparency.  Innovation.  Specialization. 

RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT 
Straight up to the sky and ever higher, up into space.
"We work constantly to keep one step ahead."​ 
This is LMA's philosophy in the field of technological innovation.
Thanks to considerable technological investments and know-how gained, today the company is considered a reference point for important national and international clients both in civil and military sectors, with the title of Tier 1 for important multinational companies in the aerospace sector.

Its outstanding reputation is endorsed by partnerships with leading global players in the aeronautical industry. 

Avio Aero is committed to developing technologies and new architectures capable of lowering energy consumption, reducing aircraft weight and improving performance.

Maestrale is a high-tech company that specializes in developing state-of-the-art advanced aircraft Flight Training Devices and Full Flight simulators. Our flight simulators are designed to provide the most realistic and engaging flight experience possible for both commercial and military pilots.

Our simulators feature a real-size cockpit and flight instrumentation, innovative dynamic movement control in real-time, and Enhanced Mixed Reality techniques that bring the interaction between humans, computers, and the environment to a whole new level. Our software is based on detailed real fixed-wing or rotary-wing aircraft flight data, making our simulators exceptionally realistic and perfectly suited for training novice and experienced pilots in a variety of aviation contexts, including ab initio, basic flying, conversion training, mission training, and Full Flight Mission (High fidelity Level-D) training.

Our simulators are designed to meet all EASA requirements, and we have the ability to design and realize flight simulators for different types of fixed-wing and rotary-wing aircraft models. With over three decades of experience, we are committed to providing the most advanced and reliable flight simulators on the market.

Company Short Description:
Titan4 is committed to leveraging innovative earth observation downstream solutions to advance environmental stewardship and safety on a global scale. Building on our successful incubation period in the European Space Agency BIC program, Titan4 harnesses innovative technologies to process and analyze optical and radar satellite images with unparalleled speed, cost-effectiveness, and accuracy.

Our mission is to empower stakeholders to monitor and safeguard the health of our planet's ecosystems and infrastructure, providing actionable insights and timely information to inform strategic planning, risk management, and policy development. With the Titan4 platform, users can assess and monitor public and private infrastructures, land stability, structural deformations, seismic areas, and more. Our automatic InSAR data processing tool delivers near real-time results at a millimeter scale, complemented by data fusion features, visual and historical reports, trend analysis, and critical deformation alerts.

Key features of Titan4 platform include:
- Rapid and highly accurate results
- Flexible pay-per-use pricing model
- Scalable high-performance computing for large geographical areas
- Streamlined automation of all processing phases
- Intuitive interface and API connections for data integration
- Comprehensive training and dedicated assistance at every stage

At Titan4, we pride ourselves on our interdisciplinary team of telecom engineers, data scientists, and software architects. This collaborative approach ensures the robustness, reliability and innovation of our solutions, making Titan4 the preferred choice for both public and private sector clients seeking to leverage satellite technology for environmental monitoring and sustainability initiatives.

Join us in our vision to preserve our planet for future generations. Let's work together to unlock the full potential of satellite data integration and drive positive environmental impact.

Company Short Description:
Nata nel 1988, l'Agenzia Spaziale Italiana è un ente pubblico nazionale, indirizzato e supportato dal "Comitato Interministeriale per le Politiche relative allo Spazio e all'Aerospazio" (COMINT). L'ASI, pur restando vigilata dal Ministero dell'Università e della Ricerca, svolge le proprie attività istituzionali in conformità con gli indirizzi del Governo, sulla base dei quali predispone il Documento Strategico di Politica Spaziale Nazionale ed il Documento di Visione Strategica per lo Spazio. Il COMINT è stato istituito ai sensi dell'art.2 della Legge 11 gennaio 2018, n.7, che, modificando il Decreto Legislativo 4 giugno 2003, n.128, ristruttura organizzazione e compiti di ASI.
In meno di due decenni si è affermata come uno dei più importanti attori mondiali sulla scena della scienza spaziale e delle tecnologie satellitari. L'ASI ha oggi un ruolo di primo piano tanto a livello europeo, dove l'Italia è il terzo paese che contribuisce maggiormente all'ESA, quanto a livello mondiale. Ha infatti uno stretto e continuo rapporto di collaborazione con la NASA, che la porta a partecipare a molte delle più interessanti missioni scientifiche degli ultimi anni. Uno dei progetti più affascinanti è stata la costruzione e l'attività della Stazione Spaziale Internazionale, dove gli astronauti italiani sono ormai di casa.
L'ASI ha dato importanti contributi all'esplorazione spaziale, costruendo strumenti scientifici che hanno viaggiato con le sonde NASA ed ESA e in tutte le principali missioni pianificate per i prossimi anni ci sarà un pezzo di Italia.
Dall'Universo all'osservazione della Terra, per prevedere e prevenire, ad esempio, disastri ambientali e misurare gli effetti del cambiamento climatico: anche in questo l'Italia è all'avanguardia con sistemi come Cosmo Sky-Med. L'Italia, attraverso l'ASI e l'industria italiana, continua una tradizione di ricerca nella propulsione spaziale, in particolare come leader del programma europeo VEGA, lanciatore di progettazione italiana.

Da sempre inserita nel mercato dell' automotive, per il quale è avviata la produzione in serie – Facchini realizza soluzioni su misura per qualsiasi tipo di Cliente grazie alla produzione specializzata di piccoli lotti curati nel dettaglio con precisione sartoriale.

La maggior parte dei prodotti di Facchini viene montata su veicoli industriali, su mezzi agricoli, marini e militari. Dal taglio alla piegatura, dalla sagomatura alla rastrematura dei tubi, passando dalla saldatura: sono queste le principali fasi lavorative che Facchini svolge per la realizzazione dei particolari richiesti dai clienti.

Alcuni processi produttivi necessitano di lavorazioni esterne, come i trattamenti protettivi quali la zincatura e la verniciatura, per i quali l'azienda si avvale di fornitori competenti, affidabili e competitivi.

Company Short Description:
NHIndustries is the largest rotorcraft Joint Venture in European history and is responsible for the latest generation NH90 military helicopter. The Company takes the best from European Rotorcraft and Defence Industry being owned by Airbus Helicopters, Leonardo Helicopters and Fokker Aerostructures. 
Each company has a long aerospace pedigree and brings the best of its skills and expertise to the end product.

The NH90, designed according to the most demanding NATO standards, meets the needs of a modern military customer. 
It is a highly versatile medium twin-engine helicopter and thanks to its large full composite airframe, its excellent power to weight ratio and its wide range of role equipment, is the optimal choice for a wide range of tasks including blue water naval operations, maritime support, tactical land missions and medical evacuation.
It features a redundant Fly-by-Wire flight control system for reduced Pilot's workload and enhanced flight characteristics.

The NH90 is proposed in two main variants, one dedicated to naval operations, the NH90 NFH (Nato Frigate Helicopter) and one for land based operations, the NH90 TTH (Tactical Transport Helicopter).
It is now in service with the armed forces of Australia, Belgium, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Italy, New Zealand, Norway, Oman, Sweden and The Netherlands.

The NH90 has been operationally and successfully deployed in overseas operations with outstanding achievements.

Company Short Description:
Toscana Aeroporti S.p.A is the management company of Florence and Pisa airports. Toscana Aeroporti was established on 1 June 2015 from the merger of AdF - Aeroporto di Firenze S.p.A. (management company of A. Vespucci airport in Florence) and SAT - Società Aeroporto Toscano S.p.A. (management company of the G. Galilei airport in Pisa). The Toscana Aeroporti group is made up of the main company Toscana Aeroporti Spa and of the subsidiaries Jet Fuel Co, S.r.l. (hereinafter Jet Fuel), Parking Peretola S.r.l., Toscana Aeroporti Engineering S.r.l., Toscana Aeroporti Handling S.r.l. 
The merger between the two companies is the fundamental step for the creation of a single Tuscan airport system, in line with the provisions of the National Airport Plan approved by the Italian Ministry of Transport. Thanks to the synergies between the two airports and to the complementarity of the system's offer as a whole, it will be possible to increase the number of destinations reachable by the two airports and the airlines thanks to the adaptation of the respective infrastructures. In the long term, Tuscany Airports expects to achieve more than 130 destinations around the world, 45 airlines and 160 daily frequencies companies in 2029. The two airports will maintain their specificity in the specialization of air traffic: Vespucci airport will continue to develop business and leisure traffic through full service carriers, connecting the main European hubs; Galilei airport will favor tourist traffic managed by low-cost carriers, cargo flights and will also focus on the development of intercontinental flights.
Thanks to the integration of these two realities, Tuscany will be able to count on one of the most important airport systems in the country, able to constitute a driving force for economic development of the territory at the height of one of the most known and loved regions in the world.

Company Short Description:
BEAMIT Group is one of the most integrated and advanced additive manufacturing service providers in the world to serve the most demanding industries. Based in Fornovo di Taro (Parma, Italy), BEAMIT has been operating in the field of additive manufacturing (AM) with metal powders for nearly 25 years. With almost 60 dedicated additive manufacturing systems distributed in over 6 facilities between Italy and UK today the Group counts over 120 employees.
In 2019, Sandvik Group, global leader in hi-tech engineering and metal powder with the widest range of alloys for Additive Manufacturing as well as remarkable expertise in AM printing technologies for advanced metal components, acquired a significant stake in BEAMIT.
In 2020, BEAMIT acquired a significant stake in PRES-X, an innovative start-up in the field of special post-production processes for 3D printing. In the same year BEAMIT acquired AM service bureau ZARE and in 2021 acquired 3T Additive Manufacturing (Newbury, UK) from AM GLOBAL Holding GmbH becoming the most integrated and advanced AM service provider in the world.
With over 30 alloys BEAMIT has the highest number of materials qualified as AM player in EU and can claim an extraordinary R&D department with a considerable amount of patented new materials. 
BEAMIT Group also holds several relevant quality certifications including AS/EN9100 and IATF Automotive, and NADCAP accreditation.
The company specializes in advanced metal AM components for:
-	Aerospace
-	Automotive
-	Energy
-	Racing 
-	Industrial
-	Motorsport

✈️ We look forward to welcoming you on board!

Company SEO Description: e-GEOS is a leading international player in the Earth Observation (EO) and Geo-Spatial Information business.
Company Short Description:
e-GEOS, a Telespazio (80%) / ASI (20%) company, is a leading international player in the geo-spatial business. e-GEOS offers a complete range of products and services in the Earth Observation and in the geo-spatial application domains, based on both optical and radar satellites as well as on aerial surveys. The Rome-based company employs more than 300 people and operates through the Earth Observation centers in Matera (Italy) and Neustrelitz (Germany). As the European hub for VHR (Very High Resolution) data, e-GEOS grants unique access to the COSMO-SkyMed data, and to the major optical missions.

In particular, COSMO-SkyMed represents a tremendous competitive advantage as it opens up a new era of operational applications. The COSMO-SkyMed earth observation programme of the Italian Space Agency and the Italian Ministry of Defence, based on a constellation of four VHR SAR satellites, provides all-weather, day and night, world-wide radar data acquisitions. e-GEOS exploits COSMO-SkyMed data to offer near-real-time monitoring services and large-area mapping capabilities for customers such as NGA (National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency of the US Government), in combination with its existing product and services portfolio, which comprises solutions for key vertical markets including emergency management, maritime surveillance, agriculture & forestry, cadastre, environmental protection, oil & gas, utilities and industries.

D-Orbit is a global market leader in the space logistics and transportation service industries with a track record of space-proven technologies and successful missions. The company has developed proprietary space logistics technology and transportation solutions to accelerate the growth and development of a trillion-dollar space economy through an incremental strategic approach to the space marketplace to deliver successful customer outcomes today while developing advanced products and services for the needs of tomorrow.

D-Orbit was founded in 2011. With a manifest of future missions fully booked by new and returning customers, the company has already successfully flown over 70 payloads. D-Orbit is the first company to address the logistics needs of the space market. Its forward-thinking view has enabled it to consistently create solutions for its customers that save them money and time, like ION Satellite Carrier, a vehicle that can transport satellites in orbit and release them individually into distinct orbital slots, and a proprietary cloud-based mission control software suite designed to control entire satellite constellations. 

As it looks to the future, D-Orbit is already developing and testing new technologies to extend the life of satellites in orbit, perform active debris removal, enable interplanetary space logistics, and more. Company SEO Description: e-GEOS is a leading international player in the Earth Observation (EO) and Geo-Spatial Information business.
Company Short Description:
e-GEOS, a Telespazio (80%) / ASI (20%) company, is a leading international player in the geo-spatial business. e-GEOS offers a complete range of products and services in the Earth Observation and in the geo-spatial application domains, based on both optical and radar satellites as well as on aerial surveys. The Rome-based company employs more than 300 people and operates through the Earth Observation centers in Matera (Italy) and Neustrelitz (Germany). As the European hub for VHR (Very High Resolution) data, e-GEOS grants unique access to the COSMO-SkyMed data, and to the major optical missions.

In particular, COSMO-SkyMed represents a tremendous competitive advantage as it opens up a new era of operational applications. The COSMO-SkyMed earth observation programme of the Italian Space Agency and the Italian Ministry of Defence, based on a constellation of four VHR SAR satellites, provides all-weather, day and night, world-wide radar data acquisitions. e-GEOS exploits COSMO-SkyMed data to offer near-real-time monitoring services and large-area mapping capabilities for customers such as NGA (National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency of the US Government), in combination with its existing product and services portfolio, which comprises solutions for key vertical markets including emergency management, maritime surveillance, agriculture & forestry, cadastre, environmental protection, oil & gas, utilities and industries.

Techno System Developments (TSD) is an Italian private company founded in 1977. TSD is specialized into design, development and manufacturing of on-board and ground electronic equipment for aero-space applications with an experience of more than 300.000 hours of operations in flight and a total of five systems, operating in space at this time.  Our equipment is aboard satellites orbiting the Earth, spacecraft and orbiters for deep space missions and aboard the International Space Station.

TSD has over three decades of experience in the development of Imaging Systems, including acquisition, real time processing, compression, storage, packetization for transmission, and Avionic Platform for space applications. Our first flight was on 1993. Thanks to our team made up of highly skilled electronic, software engineers and by ESA qualified technicians, TSD is able to manage in house the complete end to end development process, including:

- Requirement Assessment
- Architectural Design
- HW Design, Development & Testing
- SW Design, Development & Testing - Breadbording & Simulation
- Electronic Manufacturing, Assembling, Integration & Testing
- System Testing and Space Qualification.

Company Short Description:
Toscana Aeroporti S.p.A is the management company of Florence and Pisa airports. Toscana Aeroporti was established on 1 June 2015 from the merger of AdF - Aeroporto di Firenze S.p.A. (management company of A. Vespucci airport in Florence) and SAT - Società Aeroporto Toscano S.p.A. (management company of the G. Galilei airport in Pisa). The Toscana Aeroporti group is made up of the main company Toscana Aeroporti Spa and of the subsidiaries Jet Fuel Co, S.r.l. (hereinafter Jet Fuel), Parking Peretola S.r.l., Toscana Aeroporti Engineering S.r.l., Toscana Aeroporti Handling S.r.l. 
The merger between the two companies is the fundamental step for the creation of a single Tuscan airport system, in line with the provisions of the National Airport Plan approved by the Italian Ministry of Transport. Thanks to the synergies between the two airports and to the complementarity of the system's offer as a whole, it will be possible to increase the number of destinations reachable by the two airports and the airlines thanks to the adaptation of the respective infrastructures. In the long term, Tuscany Airports expects to achieve more than 130 destinations around the world, 45 airlines and 160 daily frequencies companies in 2029. The two airports will maintain their specificity in the specialization of air traffic: Vespucci airport will continue to develop business and leisure traffic through full service carriers, connecting the main European hubs; Galilei airport will favor tourist traffic managed by low-cost carriers, cargo flights and will also focus on the development of intercontinental flights.
Thanks to the integration of these two realities, Tuscany will be able to count on one of the most important airport systems in the country, able to constitute a driving force for economic development of the territory at the height of one of the most known and loved regions in the world.

Company Short Description:
Toscana Aeroporti S.p.A is the management company of Florence and Pisa airports. Toscana Aeroporti was established on 1 June 2015 from the merger of AdF - Aeroporto di Firenze S.p.A. (management company of A. Vespucci airport in Florence) and SAT - Società Aeroporto Toscano S.p.A. (management company of the G. Galilei airport in Pisa). The Toscana Aeroporti group is made up of the main company Toscana Aeroporti Spa and of the subsidiaries Jet Fuel Co, S.r.l. (hereinafter Jet Fuel), Parking Peretola S.r.l., Toscana Aeroporti Engineering S.r.l., Toscana Aeroporti Handling S.r.l. 
The merger between the two companies is the fundamental step for the creation of a single Tuscan airport system, in line with the provisions of the National Airport Plan approved by the Italian Ministry of Transport. Thanks to the synergies between the two airports and to the complementarity of the system's offer as a whole, it will be possible to increase the number of destinations reachable by the two airports and the airlines thanks to the adaptation of the respective infrastructures. In the long term, Tuscany Airports expects to achieve more than 130 destinations around the world, 45 airlines and 160 daily frequencies companies in 2029. The two airports will maintain their specificity in the specialization of air traffic: Vespucci airport will continue to develop business and leisure traffic through full service carriers, connecting the main European hubs; Galilei airport will favor tourist traffic managed by low-cost carriers, cargo flights and will also focus on the development of intercontinental flights.
Thanks to the integration of these two realities, Tuscany will be able to count on one of the most important airport systems in the country, able to constitute a driving force for economic development of the territory at the height of one of the most known and loved regions in the world.

Company Short Description:
BLU Electronic undertakes design, build, test and production of electronic systems for final customers and for third party companies. It operates within the aerospace and military sectors, its principal activities being within the Space & Avionics arena's.

The expertise within the company is extremely broad, enabling it to work across a very wide range of disciplines. 

The company was founded in 1998 and boasts several years' experience of system design and realisation. Typical of these achievements are:

i)	Power distribution systems and Solid State Power Controllers
ii)	Controllers for electromechanical actuations
iii)	Transducer conditioning & acquisition (thermistor, LVDT, etc.) 
iv)	Acquisition and Control Unit
v)	Fuel management Unit and probe
vi)	AC/DC and DC/DC converters
vii)	uC/FPGA based boards and systems for custom applications
viii)	Microprocessor, Microcontroller & DSP design
ix)	Equipment for satellites and Microgravity (ISS) application
x)	Design, development, test and production of satellite power systems
xi)	Design, development, test and production of DC/DC converter boards 
xii)	Equipment for satellites and Microgravity (ISS) application
xiii)	Project, design and test support for mini satellites

BLU have significantly grown their knowledge and expertise in the Aerospace market in the last 10 years.
In particular the Company can apply flawless to projects involving RTCA DO-160/EUROCAE ED-14, RTCA DO-178/EUROCAE ED-12, RTCA DO-254/EUROCAE ED-80.

BLU has the capability to fulfil design, qualification, production and testing of system test RIGs for:

- ACFS (Automatic Flight Control Systems) RIG,
- AMMC (Avionic Mission Management Computer) RIG
- CDS (Cockpit Display System) RIG
- ICS (Inter-Crew Communication system) RIG

Company Short Description:
CGR spa (Compagnia Generale Ripreseaeree) is leader in Italy and Europe in the field of photogrammetry and remote sensing. Operative on the Italian market since 1969, CGR is the reference company for both the public and private sectors in the capture and processing of territory information, thanks also to the implementation of digital sensor-based state-of-the-art and innovatory technologies (from photogrammetry to the LIDARs and to multispectral sensors for remote sensing).
CGR business ranges from participation in programmes covering wide extents of territory, for which all types of information are captured, to the creation and development of specific solutions based on the cloud platform called URBEX™.
Under the TerraItaly™ brand name, CGR has made available worldwide an exhaustive library of up-to-date orthorectified images and their historical archive, unique in terms of quality and richness of images, which document the evolution of the Italian territory over the last fifty years. family that are the successors of the founder Licinio Ferretti.

Through this acquisition, new business lines and capabilities entered in the Company portfolio, including equipment for personal protection, flexible fuel tanks and a range of equipment based on the use of technological fabrics and their application in all environments.

It was in 1990 that the Company established its premises in Aprilia, strategically positioned a few kilometers away from Rome and its airports.

In 2017 the former Aero Sekur S.p.A. was split into two separate entities, reflecting the former organization of the Company in two main business lines (Airborne and Defence).

Il sistema di gestione per la qualità dell'azienda è approvato secondo le norme UNI EN ISO 9001:2008 e UNI EN 9100:2009 (AS9100/JISQ9100) per i seguenti processi e servizi:
- Saldatura di strutture e componenti in acciaio inox, lega leggera, titanio e leghe di nichel.

Company Short Description:
Argotec is an Italian aerospace company based in San Mauro Torinese (Turin, Italy), with an headquarter Melbourne (FL, U.S.). 

The company is specialized in the design, manufacture, and operation of highly reliable micro-satellites (up to 200 kg) from Earth Orbit to deep space, as well as the development of advanced solutions to support the comfort and well-being of astronauts and future space explorers. Argotec's all-in-house approach ensures the highest level of reliability, managing every step from concept and design to manufacturing and in-orbit operations. 

Since its foundation, Argotec has collaborated with leading international space agencies, including NASA, and serves as prime contractor for major projects with the European Space Agency (ESA) and the Italian Space Agency (ASI).

In 2023, Argotec's LICIACube microsatellite, part of NASA's DART mission, the first planetary defense mission in history, was awarded the prestigious AIAA Mission of the Year.

In 2024, Argotec inaugurated its new headquarters, the SpacePark, a new space factory with a production area of more than 11,000 square meters.

Company SEO Description: e-GEOS is a leading international player in the Earth Observation (EO) and Geo-Spatial Information business.
Company Short Description:
e-GEOS, a Telespazio (80%) / ASI (20%) company, is a leading international player in the geo-spatial business. e-GEOS offers a complete range of products and services in the Earth Observation and in the geo-spatial application domains, based on both optical and radar satellites as well as on aerial surveys. The Rome-based company employs more than 300 people and operates through the Earth Observation centers in Matera (Italy) and Neustrelitz (Germany). As the European hub for VHR (Very High Resolution) data, e-GEOS grants unique access to the COSMO-SkyMed data, and to the major optical missions.

In particular, COSMO-SkyMed represents a tremendous competitive advantage as it opens up a new era of operational applications. The COSMO-SkyMed earth observation programme of the Italian Space Agency and the Italian Ministry of Defence, based on a constellation of four VHR SAR satellites, provides all-weather, day and night, world-wide radar data acquisitions. e-GEOS exploits COSMO-SkyMed data to offer near-real-time monitoring services and large-area mapping capabilities for customers such as NGA (National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency of the US Government), in combination with its existing product and services portfolio, which comprises solutions for key vertical markets including emergency management, maritime surveillance, agriculture & forestry, cadastre, environmental protection, oil & gas, utilities and industries.

Company Short Description:
In 1962 LEAT started its activity in overhaul, maintenance and upgrade of communication equipment, instrumentation and audio recorders for military avionics applications.
Since the beginning, LEAT core business was focused on maintenance, repair and overhaul of avionics equipment and navigation systems in compliance with Aviation Regulations, today EASA Part 145 for civil aircrafts.
Keeping a strong focus on its original activity, LEAT current business is represented by design, manufacturing and qualification of avionics equipment and/or systems, new product technology insertion, upgrading or replacement of obsolete equipment, product enhancement.
LEAT is also the official service station of FLIR Systems in Italy, providing maintenance, repair and training services to the A/C manufacturers as well as to the end-users.
LEAT recently signed an agreement with FLIR Systems to become the official representative and distributor in Italy of FLIR products dedicated to the maritime sector.
As an EASA 21J certified company, LEAT is able to design minor and major changes of avionics configuration, interiors and structural repairs on small/large aircrafts with the issue of the official EASA STC.
Since August 2010, LEAT is part of the Globavia Group and has been progressively involved in international projects and R&D programs for military and civil applications.

Company Short Description:
OCEM Airfield is a global leader in technologies that help airports handle more aircraft, safely and efficiently, from approach to departure. 

With more than a century of expertise in the airfield industry, OCEM Airfield designs, develops, and produces all of its airfield ground lighting solutions. 

The company is partner to well over 1,500 airports on all continents with a clear focus to make the airfield safer, more efficient, and more sustainable with its advanced airfield ground lighting solutions and services. Our products, systems, and services can improve any airport's performance from approach, runway, and taxiway lighting; to power; to tower-based traffic control systems and services.

Together with Multi Electric and Augier, OCEM is part of Aretè Cocchi Technology, an industrial group of companies focused on high-tech businesses in several industries.

Drawing on over 40 years of experience and a unique combination of skills, expertise and cultures, Thales Alenia Space delivers cost-effective solutions for telecommunications, navigation, Earth observation, environmental management, exploration, science and orbital infrastructures. Company Short Description:
Benvenuto/a! 

Air Dolomiti is the Italian airline of the Lufthansa Group. Our story began in 1991 when we launched our operations with our first Trieste-Genoa route. 
Since then, we have continuously expanded our network and currently operate a modern fleet of Embraer 195 and Embraer 190 aircraft. Via our hubs in Munich and Frankfurt, we offer multiple daily connections to numerous Italian and European destinations. To accommodate the needs of both business and leisure travellers, our fare plan is arranged into six different fare levels: Economy Light, Economy Classic, Economy Green, Economy Flex, Business Saver, Business Flex. 

Ever since our inception, we have prided ourselves on being an efficient and reliable airline that puts the customer first. Our service is built around our passengers' needs, and this is one of the reasons we offer several flights a day and are so passionate about running a regular service.
Our attention to quality has been recognised with renowned international certifications (UNI EN ISO 9001:2008 for "global quality" and IOSA, International Operations Standard Audit). Drawing on the Lufthansa Group's commitment to the environment, we also obtained EMAS (Eco-Management and Audit Scheme) registration in 2021.

As a Miles & More partner, our guests can earn miles on all Air Dolomiti flights while savouring the Italian way of life – la dolce vita – right from the get-go. 

🌐 For additional information or customer service requests, please visit airdolomiti.eu or follow us on Facebook, X, and Instagram. 

✈️ We look forward to welcoming you on board!

A.Abete srl is specialized in NC manufacture of structural parts in aluminum, titanium and steel alloys for the aerospace and aircraft's engines industry.
It was founded in 1960 as a mechanical company able to do mechanical parts for many field (automotive, aeronautical,etc.) and as steadily developed to become an international reference in the design and manufacturing of components and assemblies for aircraft engine and structural parts.
The company is just 20 kilometers away from the city of Naples.
On a total surface area of 12.000 square meters, it has an open-plan industrial building measuring 3500 sqm and a 600 square-meters,two-storey office building and rooms enough for all the key activities of the company to take place,from the technical Department to the production,from the surface processes to quality control. During 2013 a new plant of 3350 sqm for shop floor and 800 sqm for offices will be completed.
More than any words are the projects to speak up, in which the Company is involved (Boeing, Airbus, Alenia  Aermacchi, Avio) and over two hundred thousand pieces that nowadays fly in the skies around the world,in both civil and military sectors.
A.Abete s.r.l. uses the best technology on the market to ensure a high level of working quality: the presence of a plant in Nola, of an advanced machine fleet for operations of milling, turning, EDM and grinding is the most visible manifestation of the Company's activities in the processing of metallic materials
Abete S.r.l. reinvests on average about 75% of its annual profits to buy new equipment and upgrade in the best possible way technologies that contribute to increase productivity and competitiveness: machine tools, flexible manufacturing systems (FMS), ERP software, CAD/CAM/CAE and tool-path simulation (simulated CNC machining)

Company Short Description:
BEAMIT Group is one of the most integrated and advanced additive manufacturing service providers in the world to serve the most demanding industries. Based in Fornovo di Taro (Parma, Italy), BEAMIT has been operating in the field of additive manufacturing (AM) with metal powders for nearly 25 years. With almost 60 dedicated additive manufacturing systems distributed in over 6 facilities between Italy and UK today the Group counts over 120 employees.
In 2019, Sandvik Group, global leader in hi-tech engineering and metal powder with the widest range of alloys for Additive Manufacturing as well as remarkable expertise in AM printing technologies for advanced metal components, acquired a significant stake in BEAMIT.
In 2020, BEAMIT acquired a significant stake in PRES-X, an innovative start-up in the field of special post-production processes for 3D printing. In the same year BEAMIT acquired AM service bureau ZARE and in 2021 acquired 3T Additive Manufacturing (Newbury, UK) from AM GLOBAL Holding GmbH becoming the most integrated and advanced AM service provider in the world.
With over 30 alloys BEAMIT has the highest number of materials qualified as AM player in EU and can claim an extraordinary R&D department with a considerable amount of patented new materials. 
BEAMIT Group also holds several relevant quality certifications including AS/EN9100 and IATF Automotive, and NADCAP accreditation.
The company specializes in advanced metal AM components for:
-	Aerospace
-	Automotive
-	Energy
-	Racing 
-	Industrial
-	Motorsport

Solar Flight - the world's leader in solar powered aircraft. 

Solar Flight Inc. specializes in the design, manufacture, and testing of aircraft with particular expertise in advanced materials, lightweight structures, and the integration of solar power systems in aircraft. With decades of experience in the workshop and in the sky, Solar Flight has brought aircraft from the concept phase through flight testing many times.
Solar Flight's first airplane, the Sunseeker I, made the first solar powered crossing of America in 1990. In 2009, new records were set with the Sunseeker II, as well as the completing the first ever solar powered crossing of the Alps and a tour of Europe. The Sunseeker aircraft have logged more time than the combination of every other solar powered airplane in the world.

Company Short Description:
I.C.P. was born in 1980, the main activity was concentrated on wiring production for domestic appliance and electromechanical sector.  In the following years, starting from 1984, the company specialized in the design and production of wear indicators of friction materials for disc and drum brakes of cars, industrial vehicles and motorcycles, as well as wiring in the same sectors .
Starting from 1988 was joined to this activity the import of microlight aircraft "Chickinox", and the following year I.C.P. began with planning, design and production of ultra-light aircraft aluminium alloy, with exclusive features of sturdiness and versatility, well known for the security guarantees at international level.
 At the end of the 90s, the Sole Director Tancredi Razzano, decided to industrialize the production of ultralight aircraft, up to that time built solely in the artisan sector with the use of templates and stopovers. Starting to produce all the details of the aircraft in series, with the use of CNC machines, I.C.P. it faces a conspicuous economic investment which, although costly, turns out to be profitable in the long run. The results obtained have led to excellent cost optimization, the facilitation of aircraft assembly and the achievement of a final product of superior quality to the handcrafted one. With this production strategy, a significant contribution has been made to making flying economically accessible to all enthusiasts, while at the same time recording significant company growth.

Company Short Description:
AeroDron è un'azienda italiana esclusivamente dedicata alla ricerca e sviluppo di applicazioni che utilizzano Sistemi Aeromobili a Pilotaggio Remoto (SAPR).
Dal 2013, anno della fondazione, AeroDron sperimenta e realizza soluzioni applicative in molteplici settori industriali e nella Pubblica Amministrazione, facendo leva sull'immenso valore delle informazioni che possono essere tratte da rilievi aerei a bassa quota, utilizzando lo stato dell'arte delle tecnologie di volo, rilevamento, visione e post-elaborazione.
A sottolineare il nostro impegno all'innovazione nello sviluppo di applicazioni che utilizzino SAPR, AeroDron è stata selezionata come una delle più interessanti start-up dai principali interlocutori economici italiani e ha vinto il premio Lamarck a SMAU Bologna nel 2015.
Nello 2013 siamo stati selezionati da b-ventures, un incubatore di Buongiorno e NTT DOCOMO, tra le start-up da sostenere attraverso un programma di accelerazione costruito specificatamente per le iniziative nei settori ad alta tecnologia. Grazie a b-ventrues, AeroDron ha potuto attrarre nella propria compagine societaria una selezione di investitori e partner di primaria importanza, che hanno garantito al nostro progetto le risorse e il mentoring indispensabili per supportare la visione e il nostro progetto strategico.
La nostra missione è acquisire la leadership nella realizzazione di soluzioni applicative e nella fornitura di servizi di qualità basati sull'utilizzo dei SAPR.
Specializzati in geomatica, interpretazione delle immagini, modellazione 3D e remote sensing, mettiamo a disposizione le nostre competenze per il monitoraggio ambientale, la gestione del rischio idrogeologico, l'agricoltura di precisione, la progettazione, le ispezioni infrastrutturali, la topografia e in tutte quelle occasioni in cui l'utilizzo di SAPR può creare valore, migliorare l'efficacia e mitigare i rischi dei nostri Clienti e della Comunità.

Company Short Description:
ABL is an independent MRO and started its business in 1993, providing the engineering assistance to support mainly military projects in Italy.

Thanks to its over 25 years of activity in the field of aeronautical maintenance, ABL has become a leader in the supply and maintenance of emergency and safety equipment like emergency evacuation slides, life rafts, life vests, oxygen bottles, engine fire extinguishers, floatation for helicopters, main emergency batteries.

Our facilities are located in Europe (in the neighbourhood of  Rome) and Middle East (Abu Dhabi Airports Free Zone). They are approved by EASA, FAA, GCAA and DOT. We are offering AOG service upon request and exchange service from both locations.

Our headquarters, component division and R&D division are located a few miles south of Rome, strategically positioned among the biggest Italian military airport (Pratica di Mare) and the two major civil airports of Rome (Fiumicino and Ciampino). It covers an area of 1500 square meters and serves all our customers mainly in Europe.

Our Component Division in the UAE covers an area of 720 square meters. It is positioned close to the Abu Dhabi International Airport and maintains the emergency components of our customers mainly in the Mena region and Africa (UAE, Saudi, Kuwait, Oman, India, South Africa).

Thanks to its experience, ABL grants maintenance and testing of the major aircraft life-support systems. Our component division has been developed to meet our customers' demands requiring quick and at the same time high quality repairs.

We are proud of offering personal service by anticipating the needs of our clients.

Please feel free to send us your enquiry and express your needs: our dedicated team will do their best to provide you a fast and reliable assistance.

Company SEO Description: Startup Innovativa - SpinOff Politecnico di Milano - Drone Radio Beacon
Company Short Description:
Drone Radio Beacon is a patented solution for driving drones with a very high accuracy (10s of centimeters) and an outstanding reliability. It can be also used as a stand-alone or a redundant safety device in mission critical applications as it does not need any GPS signal or video processing technique to operate. Safe, precise and automated flight is assured by DRB ground station able to drive a compliant drone according to a predetermined path. Drone Radio Beacon can establish no-fly zones, let the drone follow predetermined flight corridors or land it precisely onto the ground station itself.

Propretary AI SW runs onboard for features detection in applications such as WTG or powerlines inspections. For example, the actual WTG hub and insulator heights, or the inclination of the wind blade are used in cooperation with the ground station positioning for taking into account the difference between standard waypoints and reality, increasing precision, reliability and safety. The nominal mission is thus updated on the fly keeping full control of the drone flight plan.
A suite of tools is also present for enhanced operations that take advantage of DRB autonomous drone system: battery recharging landing station, robotic arm for instruments, sensors for visual, infrared and ultraviolet inspections or NDT.

Thanks to DRB AI engine, the DRB platform rapidly analyzes collected data and pictures taken by the drone thus ensuring full value from a drone inspection. In a little time inspection report is produced, divided into categories of priority according to the seriousness of the damage and complete with recommendations to cost-effective improvements.

Company Short Description:
NHIndustries is the largest rotorcraft Joint Venture in European history and is responsible for the latest generation NH90 military helicopter. The Company takes the best from European Rotorcraft and Defence Industry being owned by Airbus Helicopters, Leonardo Helicopters and Fokker Aerostructures. 
Each company has a long aerospace pedigree and brings the best of its skills and expertise to the end product.

The NH90, designed according to the most demanding NATO standards, meets the needs of a modern military customer. 
It is a highly versatile medium twin-engine helicopter and thanks to its large full composite airframe, its excellent power to weight ratio and its wide range of role equipment, is the optimal choice for a wide range of tasks including blue water naval operations, maritime support, tactical land missions and medical evacuation.
It features a redundant Fly-by-Wire flight control system for reduced Pilot's workload and enhanced flight characteristics.

The NH90 is proposed in two main variants, one dedicated to naval operations, the NH90 NFH (Nato Frigate Helicopter) and one for land based operations, the NH90 TTH (Tactical Transport Helicopter).
It is now in service with the armed forces of Australia, Belgium, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Italy, New Zealand, Norway, Oman, Sweden and The Netherlands.

The NH90 has been operationally and successfully deployed in overseas operations with outstanding achievements.

Company Short Description:
D-Orbit is a global market leader in the space logistics and transportation service industries with a track record of space-proven technologies and successful missions. The company has developed proprietary space logistics technology and transportation solutions to accelerate the growth and development of a trillion-dollar space economy through an incremental strategic approach to the space marketplace to deliver successful customer outcomes today while developing advanced products and services for the needs of tomorrow.

D-Orbit was founded in 2011. With a manifest of future missions fully booked by new and returning customers, the company has already successfully flown over 70 payloads. D-Orbit is the first company to address the logistics needs of the space market. Its forward-thinking view has enabled it to consistently create solutions for its customers that save them money and time, like ION Satellite Carrier, a vehicle that can transport satellites in orbit and release them individually into distinct orbital slots, and a proprietary cloud-based mission control software suite designed to control entire satellite constellations. 

As it looks to the future, D-Orbit is already developing and testing new technologies to extend the life of satellites in orbit, perform active debris removal, enable interplanetary space logistics, and more. D-Orbit is creating an infrastructure that will broaden humankind's opportunities to operate in space and expand into the solar system.

Company Short Description:
BEAMIT Group is one of the most integrated and advanced additive manufacturing service providers in the world to serve the most demanding industries. Based in Fornovo di Taro (Parma, Italy), BEAMIT has been operating in the field of additive manufacturing (AM) with metal powders for nearly 25 years. With almost 60 dedicated additive manufacturing systems distributed in over 6 facilities between Italy and UK today the Group counts over 120 employees.
In 2019, Sandvik Group, global leader in hi-tech engineering and metal powder with the widest range of alloys for Additive Manufacturing as well as remarkable expertise in AM printing technologies for advanced metal components, acquired a significant stake in BEAMIT.
In 2020, BEAMIT acquired a significant stake in PRES-X, an innovative start-up in the field of special post-production processes for 3D printing. In the same year BEAMIT acquired AM service bureau ZARE and in 2021 acquired 3T Additive Manufacturing (Newbury, UK) from AM GLOBAL Holding GmbH becoming the most integrated and advanced AM service provider in the world.
With over 30 alloys BEAMIT has the highest number of materials qualified as AM player in EU and can claim an extraordinary R&D department with a considerable amount of patented new materials. 
BEAMIT Group also holds several relevant quality certifications including AS/EN9100 and IATF Automotive, and NADCAP accreditation.
The company specializes in advanced metal AM components for:
-	Aerospace
-	Automotive
-	Energy
-	Racing 
-	Industrial
-	Motorsport

Company SEO Description: Avio Aero is a Ge Aerospace business which operates in the design, manufacture and maintenance of civil and military aeronautics components and systems
Company Short Description:
Avio Aero is a GE Aerospace company specialized in the design, production and maintenance of components and systems for the civil and military aeronautical industry. Today the company delivers the innovative technological solutions its customers need to respond rapidly to the ever-changing demands of the market, including additive manufacturing, rapid prototyping and units for lean manufacturing of transmissions, turbines and combustors. 

Headquartered in Italy, Avio Aero has major facilities in Rivalta di Torino, Pomigliano d'Arco (Naples) and Brindisi. It has more than 5,700 employees worldwide, including around 4,600 in Italy, and a production facility in Poland and one in the Czech Republic.

As a result of its continuous R&D investments and an established international network of relationships with leading universities and research centers, Avio Aero has acquired a level of technological and manufacturing excellence that is recognized the world over. Its outstanding reputation is endorsed by partnerships with leading global players in the aeronautical industry. 

Avio Aero is committed to developing technologies and new architectures capable of lowering energy consumption, reducing aircraft weight and improving performance.
